steps.title: Substitute the known volume
steps.content:
The equation is
$$0.12x+0.22y=0.21(x+y)$$
The amount of $12\%$ solution is $40.0$ gallons, so substitute $x=40$:
$$0.12(40)+0.22y=0.21(40+y)$$

steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content: Simplify and isolate $y$: $$4.8+0.22y=8.4+0.21y$$ $$0.01y=3.6$$ $$y=360$$ The answer is 360.
